used_for: PRIMARY training data — crop yield (quintal/ha) computation
notes: Must be downloaded manually and placed at D:/Downloads/apy.csv or set APY_CSV_PATH env var. Filtered to Punjab state + 4 target crops + Rabi/Kharif seasons only.

original_source: India Soil Health Card data / ICAR Punjab research publications
used_for: Training feature: N / P / K / pH / soil_moisture per district
notes: 22 Punjab districts hardcoded. For live inference: refined by SoilGrids API (ISRIC) for GPS-specific N and pH.

original_source: Historical Punjab climate data (multi-year district medians)
notes: Fixed values for Rabi and Kharif seasons used during training. For live API inference: real-time OpenWeatherMap v2.5 current weather API is called.

original_source: ICAR crop physiology benchmarks + Punjab Dept of Agriculture
used_for: Feature engineering: temperature deviation / base yield / yield clipping bounds
notes: Crop mean optimal temperatures and base yields for 4 crops.

original_source: Punjab Irrigation Department / remote sensing land-use studies
notes: Borewell: 5 south-west districts. Rainfed: 3 hilly districts. All others: Canal.

used_for: Refining nitrogen + soil_ph for specific GPS coordinates at inference time
notes: Free — no API key needed. Returns cg/kg nitrogen (converted ×0.2) and pH×10 (divided ÷10).

used_for: Live weather (temperature / humidity / rainfall) for GPS coordinates at inference time
notes: Requires OPENWEATHER_API_KEY. Falls back to default values (25°C / 60% RH / 0mm rain) if key absent.
